EntraId.//: Populated per-environment. TenantId + ClientId (audience) must match the SPA's App Registration.
EntraId.//scopes: The scopes claim expected on incoming tokens; leave null to skip enforcement.

Data.//: IsMocked=false → repositories return live persistent data; true → in-memory seed data. Toggle read once at start-up by BaseRepository<T>.
Data.//LiveRepositories: Per-repo override — these repos use live SQL even when IsMocked=true. Useful during phased mock→SQL migration.

Sql.//: Azure SQL connection string. Prefer ConnectionStrings:ArtaSql from infra. Local/dev can fall back to Sql:ConnectionString.

Cors.//: Origins allowed to call the API from the browser. Set per-env via Cors__AllowedOrigins__0, Cors__AllowedOrigins__1, ... app-settings.

WebApp.//: Public URL of the SPA. When set, GET / on the API returns a 302 to this URL.

Admin.//: Bootstrap oids (Entra objectId GUIDs) that are treated as full Admin persona even when no AppUser row exists. Solves the first-admin chicken-and-egg. Set per-env via Admin__BootstrapOids__0, Admin__BootstrapOids__1, ...
